uploadLockfileCard.title: Upload Lockfile
uploadLockfileCard.description: Upload your package-lock.json file to analyze dependency impact
uploadLockfileCard.analyzedSuffix: analyzed. Click or drop to replace it.
uploadLockfileCard.error: Analysis failed. Please upload a valid package-lock.json file.

dependencyGraphCard.title: Dependency Graph
dependencyGraphCard.description: The graph shows how packages connect and which ones have the highest impact on your project.
dependencyGraphCard.mockModeNote: This live demo uses mock data. The production backend is intentionally disabled to avoid hosting costs.
dependencyGraphCard.mockModeNoteSuffix: Full functionality is available in the source code.
dependencyGraphCard.emptyState: Graph visualization will render here after analysis

riskTableCard.title: Top Impact Packages
riskTableCard.description: Packages with the highest dependency impact in your graph

headers.riskTooltip: Relative impact tier derived from dependency graph position and reach
headers.reasonTooltip: Impact score estimates how many packages are affected if this package changes
headers.vulnerabilitiesTooltip: Number of known vulnerabilities for this exact package version (informational)
headers.highlightTooltip: Click to highlight this package and all packages that depend on it in the dependency graph

riskTableCard.emptyTable: Upload a package-lock.json to populate this table
riskTableCard.scrollToTopAriaLabel: Scroll to top of risk table

mockApi.placeholderBackendHint: For real AI behavior, run the backend locally.
